channel.title: Fei Li's Website
channel.description: Recent content on Fei Li's Website

item.title: Why I Switched to Hugo
item.description: Previously, I built my website with Jekyll. After careful consideration, now I decide to switch to Hugo. The reason is straightforward: Speed. Jekyll does not scale It all looks nice and great when you look at Jekyll’s official website. My initial reasons for choosing Jekyll include its integration with GitHub Pages, good documentation, wide range of themes and plugins. But when I have some 20 posts, it takes me 5~6+ seconds to build the site, and it takes around 4 seconds for saving edits in live preview, which is almost unbearable!
